@@ -1323,8 +1323,8 @@
     "docs:list": "node scripts/docs-list.js",
     "docs:spellcheck": "bash scripts/docs-spellcheck.sh",
     "docs:spellcheck:fix": "bash scripts/docs-spellcheck.sh --write",
-    "dup:check": "jscpd src extensions scripts --format typescript,javascript --pattern \"**/*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}\" --gitignore --noSymlinks --ignore \"**/*.test.ts,**/*.test.tsx,**/*.test.js,extensions/qa-matrix/src/shared/**,extensions/qa-matrix/src/report.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/docker-runtime.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/cli-paths.ts,**/node_modules/**,**/dist/**,**/.git/**,**/coverage/**,**/build/**,**/.build/**,**/.artifacts/**\" --min-lines 50 --min-tokens 300 --reporters console",
-    "dup:check:json": "jscpd src extensions scripts --format typescript,javascript --pattern \"**/*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}\" --gitignore --noSymlinks --ignore \"**/*.test.ts,**/*.test.tsx,**/*.test.js,extensions/qa-matrix/src/shared/**,extensions/qa-matrix/src/report.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/docker-runtime.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/cli-paths.ts,**/node_modules/**,**/dist/**,**/.git/**,**/coverage/**,**/build/**,**/.build/**,**/.artifacts/**\" --min-lines 50 --min-tokens 300 --reporters json --output .artifacts/jscpd",
+    "dup:check": "jscpd src extensions scripts packages ui apps qa openclaw.mjs knip.config.ts tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts --format typescript,javascript --pattern \"**/*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}\" --gitignore --noSymlinks --ignore \"**/*.test.ts,**/*.test.tsx,**/*.test.js,**/*.e2e.test.ts,**/*.live.test.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/shared/**,extensions/qa-matrix/src/report.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/docker-runtime.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/cli-paths.ts,**/node_modules/**,**/dist/**,**/.git/**,**/coverage/**,**/build/**,**/.build/**,**/.artifacts/**,vendor/**\" --min-lines 50 --min-tokens 300 --reporters console",
+    "dup:check:json": "jscpd src extensions scripts packages ui apps qa openclaw.mjs knip.config.ts tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts --format typescript,javascript --pattern \"**/*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}\" --gitignore --noSymlinks --ignore \"**/*.test.ts,**/*.test.tsx,**/*.test.js,**/*.e2e.test.ts,**/*.live.test.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/shared/**,extensions/qa-matrix/src/report.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/docker-runtime.ts,extensions/qa-matrix/src/cli-paths.ts,**/node_modules/**,**/dist/**,**/.git/**,**/coverage/**,**/build/**,**/.build/**,**/.artifacts/**,vendor/**\" --min-lines 50 --min-tokens 300 --reporters json --output .artifacts/jscpd",
     "format": "oxfmt --write --threads=1",
     "format:all": "pnpm format && pnpm format:swift",
     "format:check": "oxfmt --check --threads=1",
